summary: Focana 1.7.3 tightens the handoff back into work after saving a session or moving into floating mode.
fixes: Saving a resumed task for later now takes you straight to the What's next? screen so you can choose the next focus without seeing the resume prompt again.
Manually minimizing Focana to floating mode now stays quiet instead of immediately opening an overdue What's next? or Ready to resume? prompt.
